clubs.name: World Cultures Society
clubs.description: The World Cultures Society celebrates the many backgrounds represented at Lakeside Secondary through food fairs, language exchanges, and guest speakers. Members plan the school's annual heritage week and share traditions from their own families.

clubs.name: Francophone Club
clubs.description: A relaxed space to practice French conversation, watch Quebecois films, and enjoy cafe-style meetups. Beginners and fluent speakers are equally welcome.

clubs.name: Indigenous Voices Circle
clubs.description: Indigenous Voices Circle honours local First Nations culture with storytelling, art, and community partnerships. The club leads Orange Shirt Day and land-acknowledgement education across the school.

clubs.name: Rock Climbing Club
clubs.description: Rock Climbing Club takes members to the indoor bouldering wall to build strength, technique, and confidence. All experience levels are supported, and safety gear is provided.

clubs.name: Ultimate Frisbee
clubs.description: Ultimate Frisbee is a fast, friendly, self-refereed sport focused on spirit of the game. The club runs casual scrimmages and enters the regional spring league.

clubs.name: Trail Running Club
clubs.description: Trail Running Club explores the lakeside paths around campus while training for community fun runs. Members set personal goals and cheer each other on regardless of pace.
